# CWE-1067 positive: leading-wildcard LIKE scan (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1067-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1067: Excessive Execution of Sequential Searches of Data Resource.
// Vulnerable: query uses LIKE '%term%' forcing full table scan on notes.body.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

func SearchNotesPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		term := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
		pattern := fmt.Sprintf("%%%s%%", term)
		rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, body FROM notes WHERE body LIKE $1", pattern)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		defer rows.Close()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"results":[]}`))
	}
}
